description:
Resolve the fz-rh2.9 artifact failures where compiler2 reaches an incomplete semantic/materialized artifact: enum_map_family, enum_reduce_suspend, enum_take_drop_split, enum_tier0, enumerable_protocol_dispatch, map_enumerable, membership_operator, opaque_fn_value_join, range_enumerable, repr_seam_closure_predicate, tailcall_closure_captures.

Observed failure classes include missing materialized call edges, missing callable-entry targets, unresolved activation closure, and missing settled protocol direct-call edges.

Signal: each fixture can be promoted to fz2 matrix coverage or is split into a smaller bug ticket with a precise missing fact/edge.

comments.text: Completed callable/protocol/Enum artifact parity work. Semantic closure now coalesces repeated callsite observations, carries latent callable activations from escaped callable types, and treats multi-target closure calls as indirect dispatch instead of forcing a direct call edge. ABI/emission ready now derives callable entries from demanded callable facts instead of constructor scans, backend call args no longer carry callable side-channel obligations, and native/interp closure calls can resolve indirect targets at runtime. Native callable entries now adapt raw target returns back to the AnyRef closure-call continuation seam. Promoted opaque_fn_value_join, repr_seam_closure_predicate, and tailcall_closure_captures to fz2 matrix coverage. Split remaining protocol-union direct dispatch to fz-rh2.16.7. Also restored module-interface abi=1 rendering/fingerprints discovered by the full test suite.

title: Fix fz2 callable/protocol/Enum artifact parity gaps
